content.full_text:
I-88-308

EISENBERG & POLLACK
ATTORNEYS AT LAW
SUITE 1400
111 PINE STREET
SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94111
(415) 956-3567

Aug 9 8 04 AM 88

A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION

NEIL EISENBERG
HARRY POLLACK
STEPHEN R. LEOPOLD

August 8, 1988

Carla Wardlow
Fair Practices Political Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA  95804

RE:  Campaign Disclosure In Democratic State Chair Race

Dear Ms. Wardlow:

     This letter is to confirm your telephone conversation of
August 3, 1988, with Stephen R. Leopold of my office.  He
informed you that I am a candidate for Chairman of the California
State Democratic Party.  The State Chair election will take place
in mid-January, 1989.

     You stated that this race is not covered by the Fair
Practices Act, Gov. Code secs. 81,000 et seq.  In particular, you
cited secs. 82,022 through 82,024, which define "election",
"elective office", and "elective state office", respectively.

     If you have any further opinions on this matter, please
contact me or Mr. Leopold immediately.  Thank you for your
courtesy and cooperation.

                                        Sincerely yours,

                                        [signature]
                                        Neil Eisenberg

NDE:jcw


     OK
     UW
     8/11/88

Box 807 Sacramento, CA 95804 RE: Campaign Disclosure In Democratic State Chair Race Dear Ms. Wardlow: This letter is to confirm your telephone conversation of August 3, 1988, with Stephen R. Leopold of my office. He informed you that I am a candidate for Chairman of the California State Democratic Party. The State Chair election will take place in mid-January, 1989. You stated that this race is not covered by the Fair Practices Act, Gov. Code secs. 81,000 et seq. If you have any further opinions on this matter, please contact me or Mr. Leopold immediately. Thank you for your courtesy and cooperation. Sincerely yours, Neil Eisenberg NDE: jcw This is a letter from Neil Eisenberg, an attorney at Eisenberg & Pollack, to Carla Wardlow of the Fair Practices Political Commission. The letter confirms a previous telephone conversation with Stephen R. Leopold regarding Neil Eisenberg's candidacy for Chairman of the California State Democratic Party. The State Chair election is scheduled for mid-January 1989. Carla Wardlow informed Neil Eisenberg that the race is not covered by the Fair Practices Act, as defined in Gov. Code secs. 81,000 et seq., particularly citing secs. 82,022 through 82,024, which define "election," "elective office," and "elective state office," respectively. The letter concludes with Neil Eisenberg inviting Carla Wardlow to contact him or Mr. Leopold if she has any further opinions on this matter.
